class.name: GKChallenge
class.brief_description: Represents a Game Center challenge sent between players.
class.description: Base wrapper for challenge objects delivered by Game Center. Use [method load_received_challenges] to fetch outstanding challenges for the local player, inspect [member state] and [member challenge_type], and cast to [GKScoreChallenge] or [GKAchievementChallenge] when you need type-specific data.

method.name: load_received_challenges
method.description: Loads the challenges currently received by the local player. The callback receives [code](Array[GKChallenge] challenges, Variant error)[/code]. If [code]error[/code] is not null, it contains a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

members.member: The challenge payload type. See [enum ChallengeType].
Unix timestamp (seconds) when the challenge was completed, or [code]0[/code] if incomplete.
Unix timestamp (seconds) when the challenge was issued.
The player who issued this challenge.
Optional challenge message from the issuing player.
The player who received this challenge.
The current lifecycle state. See [enum ChallengeState].

constants.constant: The challenge is invalid or no longer available.
The challenge has been issued and is waiting for completion.
The receiving player completed the challenge.
The receiving player declined the challenge.
A score-based challenge backed by [code skip-lint]GKScoreChallenge[/code].
An achievement-based challenge backed by [code skip-lint]GKAchievementChallenge[/code].
A challenge payload type that this wrapper does not recognize.
